description: Configure a channel named 'Analyzer_Gateway' in NextGen Connect to listen on TCP port 6661 for HL7 messages and write received messages to '/home/ga/received_results/'. The channel must return a custom acknowledgement (ACK) containing a 'ZAK' segment that echoes the transaction ID from the incoming message's 'ZID' segment (for example, an incoming 'ZID|1|tx-123|' requires a 'ZAK|1|tx-123|' response). A sample message is available at '/home/ga/sample_zid_message.hl7'. Use the Web Administrator or the REST API at https://localhost:8443/api (credentials: admin/admin) to complete the configuration.
